evidence.detail: 21,679 followers places this account in the micro-influencer tier (10K-50K)
Calculated engagement rate of 3.80% exceeds the micro-influencer benchmark of 1.5-3%, indicating strong organic engagement
Follows 1,410 while having 21,679 followers (ratio 15.4:1), which is reasonable for a content creator
1,585 posts over established account shows consistent content production with clear niche in travel, lifestyle, and creative work
Recent posts show healthy ratios: wedding post (4,104 likes, 113 comments = 36:1), VSCO collab (422 likes, 63 comments = 7:1)
Active on TikTok with strong performance (12.4K likes on wedding video, 252.6K views on apartment update) validates Instagram audience
fakeInfluencerScore of 0.0 indicates no signs of artificial inflation, humanScore of 0.92 confirms real person operates account
Legitimate partnerships with established brands (VSCO, Erste Bank, Intersport) suggest vetted influencer status
One post shows likes as -1 but this appears to be data collection issue rather than Instagram hiding likes, as other recent posts show normal like counts
